finding_results.notes: Recast the packet-cited clipped beats as grammatical close-third narration and cleaned adjacent fragmentary emphasis in the same pattern so the pressure stays scene-earned rather than telegraphic.
finding_results.summary: Clipped noun-phrase emphasis was replaced with complete sentences while preserving the chapter's pressure and close-third intensity.

finding_results.notes: The overheard office scene now carries the actual Brooklyn bargain, while the stairwell scene shifts to Mohit's collateral mapping and to the concrete reason the offer tempts June, instead of restating the same pitch.
finding_results.summary: The June/Mohit sequence now reveals the offer once, then deepens June's emotional and strategic position by focusing on threat translation and the off-ramp's real appeal.

summary: Revised chapter 14 in place to eliminate clipped narration at the cited pressure beats and to restructure the June/Mohit confrontation so the counteroffer lands once in the office, with the aftermath scene deepening consequence rather than duplicating exposition.
